title: Add 'Connect Wallet' button to /signup
description: Add a wallet connect entry point to signup.html below the magic link section. The button triggers the Web3Modal flow added in Phase 2 (TASK-038).
acceptance_criteria: A 'Connect Wallet' button is visible at the bottom of the signup card
Button displays the WalletConnect logo icon (SVG inline or img) alongside the label
Clicking the button in Phase 1 shows a toast: 'Wallet sign-in coming soon' (placeholder — replaced in TASK-038)
technical_notes: The actual Web3Modal integration is wired in TASK-038. This task only adds the UI placeholder to unblock Phase 1 development.
